title: ⚠ MAP KEY — these are MODERN political borders
description: All coloured regions on this synthesis map are MODERN country borders. Season 2's origin regions span ancient Sumer, the Caucasus, Gaelic Scotland/Ireland, colonial Caribbean, indigenous Mexico, and Heian Japan — none of which match today's political geography.

Origin 1 — Beer (Iraq / Sumer)
description: Beer's ORIGIN — Sumerian Mesopotamia, modern Iraq. 4,000+ years of documented brewing. Ninkasi hymn + Hammurabi's tavern laws.

title: Origin 2 — Wine (Georgia / Caucasus)
description: Wine's ORIGIN — 8,000-year qvevri tradition at Gadachrili Gora. Georgia + Armenia pre-date all Mediterranean wine production.

title: Origin 3 — Whiskey (Scotland + Ireland)
description: Whiskey's ORIGIN — Gaelic 'uisge beatha' (water of life). 1494 Scottish Exchequer Rolls are the first written whisky record.

title: Origin 4 — Rum (Barbados / Caribbean)
description: Rum's ORIGIN — Barbados 1640s, built on enslaved labour in British sugar-plantation economy. Atlantic slave triangle anchor.

title: Origin 5 — Tequila + Mezcal (Mexico)
description: Tequila + mezcal ORIGIN — indigenous Zapotec, Mixtec, Nahua fermentation of agave predates Spanish arrival. Tequila DO (1974) + Mezcal DO (1994) protect the names.

title: Origin 6 — Sake (Japan)
description: Sake's ORIGIN — 2,000+ years of Japanese rice fermentation. Niigata + Hyogo Nada + Kyoto Fushimi three-region anchor.
